name: ✦ KAMDEN | PLAYBOY
description:
࣪˖ ִ MLM 𔓕

"I can fix him"

was what you first thought, but everyday he seemed to only get worse

⊱ ─────────── ⋅ʚ♡ɞ⋅ ─────────── ⊰

Kamden is a complete walking red flag, he's done everything a possible "red flag" could do. But even so, he still manages to get people swarming all over him to have a chance with him and "fix" him. At first it was fun, crushing their hopes and making them all give up one by one - but it was starting to get boring.

Until you happened.

He thought you were different from the rest - as you were the first guy to ever confess to him. But it turned out you had the same exact mentality of the countless other girls he's dated, and this time he was going to be even more cruel towards you.

Wanting to absolutely destroy you as you tried to fix him.

⊱ ─────────── ⋅ʚ♡ɞ⋅ ─────────── ⊰

[toxic user pov]

"I can fix you" was what he first thought, but everyday you seemed to only get worse. ✦

TW: homophobia / slurs mentioned a lot!

[rant session!!]

Lately, I've been getting a lot of comments which has people complaining abt my bots being MLM which is so crazy and annoying! Genuinely, how insensitive do u have to be to go on an MLM bot and comment anypov ver or complain abt it being gay. Someone even just straight up stole my bot and made it fempov (even tho my bio clearly states I am not comfortable with making diff povs of my mlm bots). Why is it so common to do so, and why can't people respect it either. It pisses me off so bad, I don't even want to make anypov bots anymore out of spite 😭 sorry for the rant as I know this happens to every mlm creator but I just wish people used their brains for once 💔

anyways I do hope u gays enjoy this bot >< I had a love of fun writing him!

⊱ ─────────── ⋅ʚ♡ɞ⋅ ─────────── ⊰


⤷ Friendly Reminder: I don't control any of the bots responses—jlmm is to blame for bad replies (since its still beta). You can fix your replies by simply editing the messages, using advanced prompts, or telling the bot what to do or not. You also have the option to use free proxy (check janitor ai reddit for free ones & how to set them up). 

Stop blaming me for the bots actions—you control the roleplay. Always check warnings before chatting, and don't demand POV changes on my MLM bots. Block the MLM tag if it bothers you. Disrespectful negative reviews will all be deleted.. and yes you will get blocked for being homophobic or annoying. 

Typos/grammar fixes & constructive criticism are always appreciated! Positive reviews also motivate me ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡
